properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They continually, say to me Where is your God, where is your God They continually, question me Where is your God, where is your God But I know where He is

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He's in the storm He's in the rain He's in the middle of my pain He's in the night casting out fear Even in the chaos He is here, He is here He is here (He is here)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: They continually, say to me Where is your God, where is your God They continually, question me Where is your God, where is your God But I know where He is I tell you where He is

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He's in the storm He's in the rain He's in the middle of my pain He's in the night casting out fear Even in the chaos He is here, He is here oh (He is here) He is here, yeah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh in every change You'll stay the same Like yesterday, still good Consistently, faithful to me Today and always

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He'll never change You'll stay the same Like yesterday, still good Consistently, faithful to me Today and always Oh! and always

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He's in the storm He's in the rain He's in the middle of all my pain He's in the night casting out fear Even in the chaos He is here, He is here He is here, yeah Darkness can't keep your way You're here to stay Make it's ways out of nowhere

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: He's in your storm He's in your rain He's in the middle of all your pain He's in your night casting out fear Even in the chaos He is here He is here, oh! (He is here) He is here Oh can you feel it, He's here Jesus, yeah He is here
